# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_l3out_node_static_route (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `node_id` (String) The ID of the node.
- `pod_id` (String) The pod ID of the node (border leaf switch).

### Optional

- `administrative_distance` (Number) The administrative distance of the static route. The value must be in the range 1 - 255. Defaults to `administrative_distance=1` when unset during creation.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bfd_tracking` (Boolean) Enable BFD tracking for the static route. Defaults to `bfd_tracking=false` when unset during creation.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the static route. Providing an empty string `description=""` will remove the description from the static route.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `l3out` (String) The name of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out_uuid` is required.
- `l3out_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out` is required.
- `next_hop_null` (Boolean) Create a static route to Null0 interface. This is used to drop traffic for the specified prefix. Defaults to `next_hop_null=false` when unset during creation.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `prefix` (String) The prefix of the static route.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Determines the desired state of the resource. Use `absent` to remove the resource. Use `query` to list the resource. Use `present` to create or update the resource.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template` (String) The name of the template. The template must be an L3Out template. This parameter or `template_id` is required.
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the L3Out template. This parameter or `template` is required.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `track_policy` (String) The track policy to be used. Providing an empty dictionary `track_policy={}` will remove the track policy from the static route.
- `track_policy_uuid` (String) The UUID of the track policy to be used. Providing an empty string `track_policy=""` will remove the track policy from the static route.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
